productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed White Tshirts
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, snipped edges on the neckline, sleeve cuffs and hemline, and manga-inspired graphic print on the chestFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBold and stylish, this white t-shirt from united colors of benetton is perfect for casual wear. The manga cartoon of the naughty school girl is sure to start a conversation, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
